ExportFeatures LagosRoad "C:\New folder\GRL\PROJECTS\GIS UPGRADE ET AL FOR LSTMP PHASE 1\DATA\OGUN LGAS BORDERING LAGOS\LAGOS ROADS.gdb\LAGOS_ROADS_GDB" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "OBJECTID "OBJECTID" true true false 10 Long 0 10,First,#,LagosRoad,OBJECTID,-1,-1;osm_id "osm_id" true true false 10 Text 0 0,First,#,LagosRoad,osm_id,0,10;code "code" true true false 5 Long 0 5,First,#,LagosRoad,code,-1,-1;fclass "fclass" true true false 28 Text 0 0,First,#,LagosRoad,fclass,0,28;name "name" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,LagosRoad,name,0,100;ref "ref" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,LagosRoad,ref,0,20;oneway "oneway" true true false 1 Text 0 0,First,#,LagosRoad,oneway,0,1;maxspeed "maxspeed" true true false 5 Long 0 5,First,#,LagosRoad,maxspeed,-1,-1;layer "layer" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,LagosRoad,layer,-1,-1;bridge "bridge" true true false 1 Text 0 0,First,#,LagosRoad,bridge,0,1;tunnel "tunnel" true true false 1 Text 0 0,First,#,LagosRoad,tunnel,0,1;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,LagosRoad,Shape_Leng,-1,-1" #

Project LAG_ROADS_ALIU_9_LGAS "C:\New folder\GRL\PROJECTS\GIS UPGRADE ET AL FOR LSTMP PHASE 1\DATA\NEW TASK LAGOS ROADS\Projected LAG for ALIU.gdb\PROJECTED_LAG_ALIU" PROJCS["WGS_1984_UTM_Zone_31N",GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]],PROJECTION["Transverse_Mercator"],PARAMETER["False_Easting",500000.0],PARAMETER["False_Northing",0.0],PARAMETER["Central_Meridian",3.0],PARAMETER["Scale_Factor",0.9996],PARAMETER["Latitude_Of_Origin",0.0],UNIT["Meter",1.0]] # GEOGCS["GCS_WGS_1984",DATUM["D_WGS_1984",SPHEROID["WGS_1984",6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0.0],UNIT["Degree",0.0174532925199433]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL

ExportFeatures LAGOS_ROAD_FULL "C:\Users\user\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\Mr Sayo\Mr Sayo.gdb\LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "name "name" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,name,0,99;LGA "LGA" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,LGA,0,49;LCDA "LCDA" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,LCDA,0,49;Width "Width" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Width,-1,-1;Carriageway "Carriageway" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Carriageway,0,49;Lane "Lane" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Lane,0,49;Classification "Classification" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Classification,0,49;Speed_Limit "Speed_Limit" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Speed_Limit,0,49;Surface_Type "Surface_Type" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Surface_Type,0,49;Jurisdiction "Jurisdiction" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Jurisdiction,0,49;Direction "Direction" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Direction,0,49;Note "Note" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Note,0,254;Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Carriagewa "Carriagewa" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Carriagewa,0,49;Classifica "Classifica" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Classifica,0,49;Speed_Limi "Speed_Limi" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Speed_Limi,0,49;Surface_Ty "Surface_Ty" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Surface_Ty,0,49;Jurisdicti "Jurisdicti" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Jurisdicti,0,49;Notes "Notes" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Notes,0,253;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,LAGOS_ROAD_FULL,Shape_Length,-1,-1" #
CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 name ""No Name" if !name! is None or !name!.strip() == "" else !name!" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 LGA "IKORODU" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 LCDA "IKORODU NORTH" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 LCDA "IKORODU WEST" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 LCDA "IJEDE" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 LCDA "IGBAGBO-BAIYEKU" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Width DELETE_FIELDS
CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Carriageway ""Double" if !Carriageway! is None or !Carriageway!.strip() == "" else !Carriageway!" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Carriageway ""Double" if !Carriageway!is None or !Carriageway!.strip() == "" else !Carriageway!" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Carriageway !Carriageway!.replace("Null","Double") PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Carriageway !Carriageway!.replace("Null","Double") PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Jurisdicti DELETE_FIELDS
DeleteField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Speed_Limi DELETE_FIELDS
DeleteField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Surface_Ty DELETE_FIELDS
DeleteField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Note;Shape_Leng;Carriagewa;Classifica DELETE_FIELDS
CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Carriageway ""Single" if !Carriageway! is None or !Carriageway!.strip() == "" else !Carriageway!" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Lane ""Single" if !Lane! is None or !Lane!.strip() == "" else !Lane!" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Classification ""MajorService" if !Classification! is None or !Classification!.strip() == "" else !Classification!" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Speed_Limit ""30-50Km/h" if !Speed_Limit! is None or !Speed_Limit!.strip() == "" else !Speed_Limit!
" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Surface_Type ""Asphalt" if !Surface_Type! is None or !Surface_Type!.strip() == "" else !Surface_Type!
" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateField LAGOS_ROAD_FULL_ExportFeatures1 Jurisdiction ""State Government" if !Jurisdiction! is None or !Jurisdiction!.strip() == "" else !Jurisdiction!
" PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\User\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\MyProject3\MyProject3.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Merge_Clip1</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>WIDTH</field_name></DeleteField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\User\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\MyProject3\MyProject3.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Merge_Clip1</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AlterField><field_name>Width1</field_name><new_field_name>Width</new_field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><clear_field_alias>False</clear_field_alias></AlterField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=C:\Users\User\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\MyProject3\MyProject3.gdb</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>Merge_Clip1</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AssignDomainToField><field_name>Width</field_name><domain_name>Width</domain_name></AssignDomainToField></workflow></operationSequence>

ExportFeatures Merge_Clip1 "C:\Users\User\Desktop\2ND BATCH DATA SUBMISSION\LAGOS ROADS.gdb\LAGOS_ROADS" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "name "Name" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,name,0,100;LGA "LGA" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,LGA,0,50;LCDA "LCDA" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,LCDA,0,50;SUBTYPE "SUBTYPE" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,SUBTYPE,-1,-1;Classification "Classification" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,Classification,0,50;Jurisdiction "Jurisdiction" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,Jurisdiction,0,50;SURFACE "Surface" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,SURFACE,0,50;Direction "Direction" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,Direction,0,50;Carriageway "Carriageway" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,Carriageway,0,50;Lane "Lane" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,Lane,0,50;SPEED "Speed" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,SPEED,0,50;Shape_Length "Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,Shape_Length,-1,-1;COMMENT "Comment" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,COMMENT,0,255;Width "Width" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,Merge_Clip1,Width,0,255" #

ExportFeatures "BRT\Operational\Mile 12 - TBS" "E:\LAMATAGISEnterpriseDatabase\BRT\Mile 12 - TBS.shp" # NOT_USE_ALIAS "name "Route Name " true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,BRT\Operational\Mile 12 - TBS,name,0,99;Shape_Leng "Length (Km)" true true false 19 Double 0 0,First,#,BRT\Operational\Mile 12 - TBS,Shape_Leng,-1,-1" #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
